creator: alexander@tauruna.ru
text:
Created attachment 156074
nginx-postgres patch

Why you've removed this useful module if there is existing author's patch which just needed to be integrated in FreeBSD port system?
(https://github.com/FRiCKLE/ngx_postgres/commit/a9b4dd6ba99cbdece46f2e2d79628cdef1795183)
Here I attach my patch, that I've used last year to solve this problem (just put this patch in /usr/ports/www/nginx/files directory)
